scope.population: Adults using systemic HRT with a uterus
scope.setting: Primary care to gynaecology referral interface
scope.focus: Assessment, HRT adjustment window, investigation thresholds, and referral urgency
exclusions: Bleeding not temporally related to HRT use

summary: Built around BMS Nov 2024 unscheduled bleeding on HRT guideline
Uses explicit 6-month adjustment window before investigation in low-risk groups
Includes urgent TVUS and USC trigger points
